name: Update Backend Engineering Standards
description: Codify mandatory commit, relationship loading, and asyncio safety rules in GEMINI.md and backend-agent.md.

issues: RuntimeError in Celery tasks using get_event_loop()

steps: Update backend-agent.md 'Coding Contracts' section with mandatory commit policy.

Update 'Celery/Tasks' section in backend-agent.md to use asyncio.run() only.
Sync these rules into the 'Gatekeeper' section of GEMINI.md.
